MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Leon Guzman.
Attorney Paul Hogarth appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Justin Suggs is present.
Attorney Amber Lu representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of June-18-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
